mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, stat_date, stat_type, total_files, total_size, upload_count, download_count, traffic_upload, traffic_download, new_files, deleted_files, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM file_statistics WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} ORDER BY stat_date DESC
SELECT FROM file_statistics WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date DESC
SELECT FROM file_statistics WHERE stat_type = #{statType} ORDER BY stat_date DESC
SELECT FROM file_statistics ORDER BY stat_date DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO file_statistics ( bucket_name, stat_date, stat_type, total_files, total_size, upload_count, download_count, traffic_upload, traffic_download, new_files, deleted_files ) VALUES
(#{item.bucketName}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.statType}, #{item.totalFiles}, #{item.totalSize}, #{item.uploadCount}, #{item.downloadCount}, #{item.trafficUpload}, #{item.trafficDownload}, #{item.newFiles}, #{item.deletedFiles})
